title: HPV result discussion documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.
investigations.rationale: Supports an entered result and clinician-selected pathway.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition

exact_section.heading: Recommendations for HPV-positive triage and treatment eligibility

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.
investigations.rationale: Supports discussion without attributing source or timing.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Test type, date, result, age, HIV status, prior results, cytology, symptoms and programme are absent.
No HPV result, cancer, infection timing, partner source, interval, colposcopy or treatment is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
